metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_945
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 3, 5: The parallel fibers and presynaptic varicosities in the molecular layer of cerebellum were stained in EM of 10-day old mouse.
Fig 6: In the internal granular cell layer of the cerebellum, the mossy fiber terminals are stained

Note that other neuron types exhibit postsynaptic labeling (annotation 946), but that at no synapse both pre- and post-synaptic labeling was detected.

12/10/2017 Pim
- Based on the known lipid anchor of the protein, the "anchored component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Mice 1, 5, and 10 d of age were killed by decapitation or intracardiac perfusion.
